Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — An Akura is considered a potentially dangerous liability by the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Mercy is an Akura girl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — The Akura take prisoners rather than killing honorably.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — The Akura are not interested in cheap prizes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Harmony is an Akura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The Akura family is dissolving with the breaking world.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — The Akura are a group within the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Akura Mercy is an Akura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The Akura believe they can command others with their family name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — The Akura are a group mentioned by Daji.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 3''' — The Akura purify aspects of madra to produce pure madra scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — An Akura Underlord challenged Lindon to a duel in his basement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — The opponent was an Akura Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — The Akura section was in the crowd cheering.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — The Akura family has tournament visitors and servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Akura clan issued a summons that the Seishen Kingdom obeyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — Akura has a vassal team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Akura territory contains Uncrowned and Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — The goal of Abyssal Palace was not to kill Akura sacred artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — The Akura lost a rising star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Yan Shoumei went to the Akura waiting room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan Arelius is competing in an Akura vassal team.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Akura ships set down at the border of the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Akura clan has Golds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Akura clan has troops.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon looks into Akura eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Pride's mother wants to keep Mercy away from Lindon.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — King Dakata believes the Akura allow his firstborn to die and execute his second.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — The Akura put someone else's soul in Seishen Daji's body.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
